creator: dalics@gmail.com
text:
on upgrade from 6.1 release to 6.2 release/stable geli not updated. on
geli attach after type passfrase, it return error "out of sync"

Fix: 

manually cd /usr/src/sbin/geom/class/eli
 	make
 	make install
 
 and all work :(
How-To-Repeat: use 6.1 release (may be any 6.1 branch) cvsup src-all, make buildworld,
buildkernel, install kernel, mergemaster and try attach any ELI encrypted
device (geli attach /dev/***) and recive error
